title: Dabo Gorgonzola Stuffed Mushrooms
description: A rich and creamy dish combining the flavors of Dabo cheese with the earthy taste of gorgonzola, all stuffed inside gooey indulgent mushrooms.
instructions: Clean the mushrooms and remove the stems.
In a skillet over medium heat, melt the butter and sauté the garlic until fragrant.
Add the mushrooms to the skillet and cook for 2-3 minutes on each side.
In a bowl, mix together the gorgonzola and Dabo cheese.
Stuff each mushroom cap with the cheese mixture, dividing it evenly.
Sprinkle salt and pepper to taste, then top with chopped parsley.
Bake the stuffed mushrooms for 10-12 minutes, until golden brown and the cheese is melted.
